priority.full_text:
This 27 second clip from 1996 known as badday.mpg is wildly known as the first viral clip on the internet, spread as an email chain attachment..

Nowadays it’s impossible to spread like this without the help of tools like Crowdreply pushing your brand or content across ChatGPT, https://t.co/OyAcgmbNum
priority.summary: 1996年badday.mpg是互联网首个病毒视频，通过邮件链传播。对比现代需借助Crowdreply等工具才能传播。
angles: 互联网第一个病毒视频诞生记：1996年的badday.mpg

priority.full_text:
Things I really dislike about Fable:

1. Anthropic collects my prompt history, stores it, and does whatever they want with it for 30 days. No opt-out

2. They can nerf their most expensive model without telling me, billing me the same amount, wasting my time. Whenever they want
priority.summary: Gergely Orosz批评Anthropic的Fable：(1)收集提示历史30天无法退出；(2)可随意降级模型但保持计费。涉及AI产品的隐私和商业实践问题。
angles: Anthropic Fable暗坑：提示历史被存储30天，无法拒绝
